entry.title: Efficient Learning Rate Schedules for Large Transformers
entry.summary: We propose a new learning rate schedule that improves validation loss on long-context language models without changing architecture. The method is a simple modification of cosine decay with two phases.

entry.title: Attention Variants for Better Generalization
entry.summary: We compare attention mechanisms in transformer models and show that a hybrid attention pattern beats vanilla softmax attention on several benchmarks.
